c9d9675514c8.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
c9d9675514c8.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
c9d9675514c8.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

331f59fa77d3.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
331f59fa77d3.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

ebe924646f70.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
ebe924646f70.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
ebe924646f70.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

d79021778c5b.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
d79021778c5b.description: At 52 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
